question: The nightly main-to-dev sync hit merge conflicts after a feature was squash-merged to main. How should I resolve the conflicts without losing dev-only changes?
ground_truth: The answer should use the nightly-sync skill and explain the main-to-dev merge workflow: start from origin/dev, merge origin/main, resolve conflicts surgically, preserve dev-only additions, and avoid blanket strategies such as global theirs. It should mention reading the detailed procedures reference for non-trivial conflicts or CI polling.
expected_behavior: Uses the nightly-sync skill guidance before giving merge guidance.
Explains why squash-merge chains can create conflicts between main and dev.
Warns against blanket conflict resolution strategies that discard dev-only code.
References skills/nightly-sync/references/detailed-procedures.md when the conflict or CI loop needs deeper procedures.
